source.reference: Lapua 250gr Scenar G7=0.310 (Lapua factory data). Confirmed by Litz, Applied Ballistics for Long Range Shooting, 4th Ed. §11.5, Doppler radar measurements show 0.305-0.312 range.
source.methodology: BC values sourced from Bryan Litz's Applied Ballistics published Doppler radar measurements and form factor analysis.
